theme.description: Ultra-premium event discovery platform combining Apple's 2026 'Liquid Glass' aesthetic, Airbnb's functional filtering, and Linear's stark minimalism. Emphasizes depth, rich photography, and tactile micro-interactions.

rules: H1 up to text-6xl, fluid scaling, tight leading.
Labels must be uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em].

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8, p-12) for premium breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris) for category discovery. Asymmetrical spans (col-span-8, col-span-4).
spacing_and_layout.containers: Cards must have internal padding (p-6/p-8) to prevent text collision with borders.

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky headers, floating filter bars, contextual overlays, bottom nav.
glassmorphism.implementation: backdrop-blur-2xl, backdrop-saturate-150. Light: bg-white/70 + border-white/40. Dark: bg-black/60 + border-white/15. Subtle ambient shadow.

solid_cards.implementation: Solid background matching theme surface, 1px border-border, no heavy shadows.

tracing_beam.implementation: Subtle glowing gradient border tracing the card edge.

interactions: Smooth scrolling (Lenis) is mandatory for premium weight.
Staggered entrance animations on event grids.
Hover states: translate-y-[-2px] + subtle shadow expansion.
Parallax: slight delay on hero background imagery during scroll.

components.hero: Immersive discovery feed. Rich background (darkened slightly for contrast). Animated text 'Discover India's Most Important Events'. Live counter stats (events this week, cities, attendees).
components.search_and_filters: Sticky translucent filter bar (Apple Liquid Glass style) beneath the hero. Chips for fast category selection. Advanced sidebar filtering (Airbnb style) for date, price, industry.
components.event_cards: Interactive cards. Solid content base, high contrast text. Image zoom on hover. Hover reveals 'Save' and 'Share' quick actions.
components.featured_cities: Interactive India map or bento layout of cities (Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore) using rich photography and glass overlays.
components.event_detail: Cinematic hero banner with max 50% opacity overlay gradient. Timeline for schedule. Glass sticky ticket purchase bar at bottom.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST have role-based data-testid (e.g., data-testid='event-card-save-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'framer-motion' and 'lenis' for scrolling/animations.
Create a toggle for Light/Dark mode. The app must shine in both, using the defined color palettes.
Navigation and filter bars MUST use the 'Liquid Glass' aesthetic (backdrop-blur-2xl, background opacity, 1px top/inner border).
Event cards must be solid to maintain readability (Airbnb usability), while resting on rich backgrounds.
Do NOT use pure black or gray; use tinted deep obsidian for dark mode.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL buttons, links, inputs, and interactive elements. Format: kebab-case, role-based.
Hero section must include animated numeric counters.
